headline: Chubb Expands Global Claims Leadership As Investors Weigh Valuation Gap
summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) has appointed Kevin Rampe as Senior Vice President, Global Claims Officer, expanding his remit to oversee claims operations worldwide. The new role centralizes responsibility for Chubb’s global claims management, a core function for a major insurer. For investors tracking Chubb at a share price of $325.74, this executive move touches one of the most important operational levers for an insurance group: how it handles claims across markets. The company’s longer term share...
